QuantizationStatus(str, Enum):\n    \"\"\"\n    Enum storing the different states a quantized layer can be in\n\n    - Initialized: Quantization parameters are initialized to empty values\n    - Calibration: Quantization parameters are being calibrated, observers are attached\n    - Frozen: Quantization parameters are fully calibrated, observers are removed\n    - Compressed: All parameters are quantized to target dtype\n    - Decompressed: Parameters are converted back into frozen state,\n        additionally, weight qdq is skipped during forward passes for better performance\n    \"\"\"\n\n    INITIALIZED = \"initialized\"\n    CALIBRATION = \"calibration\"\n    FROZEN = \"frozen\"\n    COMPRESSED = \"compressed\"\n    DECOMPRESSED = \"decompressed\"\n\n    @classmethod\n    def lifecycle_order(cls) -> list[\"QuantizationStatus\"]:\n        \"\"\"\n        :return: list of correct quantization lifecycle order\n        \"\"\"\n        return\n\n    def __ge__(self, other):\n        if other is None:\n            return True\n        if not isinstance(other, self.__class__):\n            raise NotImplementedError\n        return LIFECYCLE_ORDER.index(self) >= LIFECYCLE_ORDER.index(other)\n\n    def __gt__(self, other):\n        if other is None:\n            return True\n        if not isinstance(other, self.__class__):\n            raise NotImplementedError\n        return LIFECYCLE_ORDER.index(self) > LIFECYCLE_ORDER.index(other)\n\n    def __lt__(self, other):\n        if other is None:\n            return False\n        if not LIFECYCLE_ORDER.index(other)\n\n\nLIFECYCLE_ORDER = [\n    QuantizationStatus.INITIALIZED,\n    QuantizationStatus.CALIBRATION,\n    QuantizationStatus.FROZEN,\n    QuantizationStatus.COMPRESSED,\n    QuantizationStatus.DECOMPRESSED,\n]\n\nDEFAULT_QUANTIZATION_METHOD = \"compressed-tensors\"\nDEFAULT_QUANTIZATION_FORMAT = \"fakequant\"\n\n\nclass QuantizationConfig(BaseModel):\n    \"\"\"\n    Full configuration specifying how a model is quantized. Each quantized layer is\n    mapped to a QuantizationScheme in config_groups.\n\n    :param config_groups: dict of QuantizationSchemes specifying the quantization\n    settings for each quantized layer. A group could also be a reference to\n    a predefined scheme name, mapped to a list of its target layers/classes\n    :param quant_method: a constant used to differentiate compressed-tensors\n    quantization from other quantization configs\n    :param format: specifies how the quantized model is stored on disk\n    :quantization_status: specifies the current status of all quantized layers. It is\n        assumed all layers are in the same state.\n    :param kv_cache_scheme: optional QuantizationArgs, that specify the\n        quantization of the kv cache. If None, kv cache is not quantized.\n        When applying kv cache quantization to transformer AutoModelForCausalLM,\n        the kv_cache_scheme gets converted into a QuantizationScheme that:\n            - targets the `q_proj` and `k_proj` modules of the model. The outputs\n              of those modules are the keys and values that might be cached\n            - quantizes the outputs of the aformentioned layers, so that\n              keys and values are compressed before storing them in the cache\n        There is an explicit assumption that the model contains modules with\n        `k_proj` and `v_proj` in their names. If this is not the case\n        and kv_cache_scheme != None, the quantization of kv cache will fail\n    :global_compression_ratio: optional informational config to report the model\n        compression ratio acheived by the quantization config\n    :ignore: optional list of layers to ignore from config_groups. Layers in this list\n        are not quantized even if they match up with a target in config_groups\n    \"\"\"\n\n    config_groups: dict[str, QuantizationScheme | list[str]]\n    quant_method: str = QuantizationStatus.INITIALIZED\n    global_compression_ratio: float | None = None\n    ignore: list[str] | None = Field(default_factory=list)\n    # `run_compressed` is a dummy, unused arg for __context):\n        \"\"\"\n        updates any quantization schemes defined as presets to be fully loaded\n        schemes\n        \"\"\"\n        for group_name, targets_or_scheme in self.config_groups.items():\n            if isinstance(targets_or_scheme, QuantizationScheme):\n                continue  # scheme already defined\n            self.config_groups[group_name] = preset_name_to_scheme(\n                name=group_name,\n                targets=targets_or_scheme,\n            )\n\n    def to_dict(self):\n        # for compatibility with HFQuantizer\n        return self.model_dump()\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_pretrained(\n        model: Module, format: str | list | None = None\n    ) -> \"QuantizationConfig | None\":\n        \"\"\"\n        Converts a model into its associated QuantizationConfig based on the\n        QuantizationScheme attached to each quantized module\n\n        :param model: model to calculate quantization scheme of\n        :return: filled out QuantizationScheme for the input model\n        \"\"\"\n        from compressed_tensors.modeling import IMPL_ATTR\n        from compressed_tensors.quantization.lifecycle.initialize import (\n            is_attention_module,\n        )\n\n        # set of all quantization schemes\n        # TODO: make quant config/scheme/args frozen/hashable and use a set\n        quantization_schemes: list[QuantizationScheme] = list()\n\n        # use any status from modules (in practice, use the last module)\n        model_status = None\n\n        # set of all quantized types\n        # this is later used to create the ignore list\n        quantization_type_names: set[str] = set()\n\n        # maps types to names which are not quantized\n        # this is later used to create the ignore list\n        ignore: dict[str, list[str]] = defaultdict(list)\n\n        # this keeps track of any kvcache schemes\n        kv_cache_scheme: QuantizationArgs | None = None\n\n        for name, submodule in model.named_modules():\n            layer_type: str = module_type(submodule)\n\n            # add config group if quantized non-attention or attention quant\n            has_config_group = is_module_quantized(submodule) and (\n                not is_attention_module(submodule) or hasattr(submodule, IMPL_ATTR)\n            )\n            # only add kvcache if quant attention (which always implies kvcache)\n            has_kv_cache = is_module_quantized(submodule) and is_attention_module(\n                submodule\n            )\n\n            if has_config_group:\n                # add to running set of schemes/layer_type_names\n                model_status = getattr(submodule, \"quantization_status\", model_status)\n                quantization_type_names.add(layer_type)\n                if submodule.quantization_scheme not in quantization_schemes:\n                    quantization_schemes.append(submodule.quantization_scheme)\n\n            if has_kv_cache:\n                model_status = getattr(submodule, \"quantization_status\", model_status)\n                kv_cache_scheme = submodule.quantization_scheme.input_activations\n\n            if not has_config_group:\n                # add non-quantized layers to the ignore list\n                if layer_type not in ignore:\n                    ignore[layer_type] = []\n                ignore[layer_type].append(name)\n\n        if (\n            len(quantization_schemes) == 0 and kv_cache_scheme is None\n        ):  # No quantized layers\n            return None\n\n        # create ignore list, only include layers whose class has ever been targeted\n        consolidated_ignore = []\n        for layer_type, ignore_names in ignore.items():\n            if layer_type in quantization_type_names:\n                # specific layers of a quantized type are ignored\n                consolidated_ignore += ignore_names\n            # else we leave it off the ignore list, doesn't fall under any of the\n            # existing quantization schemes so it won't be quantized\n\n        # create config groups from all unique schemes\n        config_groups = {}\n        for idx, scheme in enumerate(quantization_schemes):\n            group_name = \"group_\" + str(idx)\n            config_groups[group_name] = scheme\n\n        # infer format\n        if format is None:\n            if model_status == QuantizationStatus.COMPRESSED:\n                format = CompressionFormat.int_quantized.value\n            else:\n                format = CompressionFormat.dense.value\n        elif isinstance(format, list):\n            format = (\n                CompressionFormat.mixed_precision.value\n                if len(format) > 1\n                else format[0]\n            )\n\n        return QuantizationConfig(\n            config_groups=config_groups,\n            quantization_status=model_status,\n            kv_cache_scheme=kv_cache_scheme,\n            global_compression_ratio=None,\n            format=format,\n model.input_activations\n        outputs = model.output_activations\n        weights = model.weights\n        format = model.format\n\n        if inputs is not None:\n            if inputs.strategy not in (\n                QuantizationStrategy.TOKEN,\n                QuantizationStrategy.TENSOR,\n                QuantizationStrategy.GROUP,\n                QuantizationStrategy.TENSOR_GROUP,\n                QuantizationStrategy.ATTN_HEAD,\n            ):\n                if (\n                    inputs.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.GROUP\n                    and inputs.dynamic is True\n              )\n\n                raise NotImplementedError(\n                    f\"Using {inputs.strategy} strategy is not supported for \"\n                    \"activation quantization\"\n                )\n\n            if inputs.actorder is not None:\n                raise ValueError(\"Cannot apply actorder to input activations\")\n\n        if outputs is not None:\n            if outputs.actorder is not None:\n                raise ValueError(\"Cannot apply actorder to output activations\")\n\n        if format == CompressionFormat.mixed_precision:\n            raise ValueError(\n                \"mixed-precision cannot be set as a format for a QuantizationScheme\"\n            )\n\n        if (\n            inputs\n            and weights\n            and warnings.warn(\n                \"Using GROUP strategy for both weights and input_activations \"\n                f\"with different group sizes ({weights.group_size} vs \"\n :param targets: list of quantization targets to be passed to the Scheme\n    :return: new QuantizationScheme for a given name with the given targets\n    \"\"\"\n    name = name.upper()\n\n    if name not in PRESET_SCHEMES:\n        raise KeyError(\n            f\"Unknown preset scheme name {name}, \"\n            f\"available names: {list(PRESET_SCHEMES.keys())}\"\n        )\n\n    scheme_args = @classmethod\n    def get_min_capability(cls) -> int:\n        # lovelace and up\n        return 89\n\n    def create_weights(\n        self,\n        layer: torch.nn.Module,\n        input_size_per_partition: int,\n        output_partition_sizes: list[int],\n        input_size: int,\n        output_size: int,\n        params_dtype: torch.dtype,\n        weight_loader: Callable,\n        **kwargs,\n    ):\n        output_size_per_partition = sum(output_partition_sizes)\n        layer.logical_widths = output_partition_sizes\n        layer.weight_block_size = None\n        layer.orig_dtype = params_dtype\n\n        if self.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.BLOCK:\n            assert self.weight_block_size is not None\n            layer.weight_block_size = self.weight_block_size\n            # Validate block quantization shapes\n            validate_fp8_block_shape(\n                layer,\n                input_size,\n                output_size,\n                input_size_per_partition,\n                output_partition_sizes,\n                self.weight_block_size,\n            )\n\n        # WEIGHT\n        weight = ModelWeightParameter(\n            data=torch.empty(\n                output_size_per_partition,\n                input_size_per_partition,\n                dtype=torch.float8_e4m3fn,\n            ),\n            input_dim=1,\n            output_dim=0,\n            weight_loader=weight_loader,\n        )\n        layer.register_parameter(\"weight\", weight)\n\n        # WEIGHT SCALE\n        if self.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.CHANNEL:\n            weight_scale = ChannelQuantScaleParameter(\n                data=torch.empty((sum(output_partition_sizes), 1), dtype=torch.float32),\n                output_dim=0,\n                weight_loader=weight_loader,\n            )\n            weight_scale[:] = torch.finfo(torch.float32).min\n        elif self.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.TENSOR:\n            weight_scale = PerTensorScaleParameter(\n                data=torch.empty(len(output_partition_sizes), dtype=torch.float32),\n                weight_loader=weight_loader,\n            )\n            weight_scale[:] = torch.finfo(torch.float32).min\n        elif self.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.BLOCK:\n            assert layer.weight_block_size is not None\n            block_n, block_k = layer.weight_block_size[0], layer.weight_block_size[1]\n            output_size_per_partition = sum(output_partition_sizes)\n            weight_scale = BlockQuantScaleParameter(\n dtype=torch.float32,\n                ),\n                input_dim=1,\n                output_dim=0,\n                weight_loader=weight_loader,\n            )\n            weight_scale.format_ue8m0 = False\n            weight_scale[:] = torch.finfo(torch.float32).min\n\n        layer.register_parameter(\"weight_scale\", weight_scale)\n        # INPUT SCALE\n        if weight_loader=weight_loader,\n            )\n            input_scale[:] = torch.finfo(torch.float32).min\n            layer.register_parameter(\"input_scale\", input_scale)\n\n    def process_weights_after_loading(self, layer) -> None:\n        if self.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.TENSOR:\n            max_w_scale, weight = requantize_with_max_scale(\n    if _use_aiter:\n                # keep the weight as (N, K)\n                layer.weight = Parameter(\n                    shuffle_weight(weight, (16, 16)), requires_grad=False\n Parameter(weight_scale, requires_grad=False)\n\n        elif self.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.BLOCK:\n            assert self.is_static_input_scheme is False\n            if is_fp8_fnuz():\n                weight, weight_scale, _ = normalize_e4m3fn_to_e4m3fnuz(\n                    weight=layer.weight, weight_scale=layer.weight_scale\n                )\n                layer.weight =  else:\n                layer.weight.requires_grad_(False)\n                layer.weight_scale.requires_grad_(False)\n\n            # On Blackwell, block-FP8 dispatches to DeepGEMM, which needs the\n            # weight scales UE8M0-packed to match its UE8M0 activation scales.\n            use_deepgemm_runner = (\n                self.w8a8_block_fp8_linear\n                is weight_shape=layer.weight.shape,\n            )\n\n        else:\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unknown quantization strategy {self.strategy}\")\n\n        # INPUT SCALE\n        if = None\n\n    def apply_weights(\n        self,\n        layer: torch.nn.Module,\n        x: torch.Tensor,\n        bias: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n    ) -> torch.Tensor:\n        if The quantization\n        # details follow the structure defined by the QuantizationArgs\n        # pydantic model, which is used to verify the structure of the\n        # quant_config and also store the details for later use.\n\n        config_groups = config.get(\"config_groups\", dict())\n        for _, quant_config in config_groups.items():\n            targets = quant_config.get(\"targets\")\n            for target in targets:\n                target_scheme_map[target] = {}\n                target_scheme_map[target][\"weights\"] = QuantizationArgs.model_validate(\n                    quant_config.get(\"weights\")\n                )\n\n                target_scheme_map[target][\"input_activations\"] = None\n                if is_activation_quantization_format(quant_format):\n                    input_activations = quant_config.get(\"input_activations\")\n                    # there is an input_quant but it is ignored\n                    if not input_activations:\n                        assert (\n                            target_scheme_map[target][\"weights\"].type\n                            == QuantizationType.FLOAT\n                        )\n                    else:\n                        target_scheme_map[target][\"input_activations\"] = (\n                            QuantizationArgs.model_validate(  # noqa: E501\n                                quant_config.get(\"input_activations\")\n                            )\n                        )\n        return target_scheme_map\n\n    @classmethod\n    def get_config_filenames(cls) -> List[str]:\n        return []\n\n    def _check_scheme_supported(self, min_capability: int, error: bool = True) -> bool:\n        capability_tuple = DeviceCapability(*torch.cuda.get_device_capability())\n\n        if capability_tuple is not None:\n            capability = capability_tuple.to_int()\n            supported = capability >= min_capability\n            if error and not supported:\n                raise RuntimeError(\n                    \"Quantization scheme is not supported for \",\n                    f\"the current GPU. Min capability: {min_capability}. \",\n                    f\"Current capability: {capability}.\",\n                )\n            return supported\n        else:\n            return False\n\n    def _is_dynamic_token_w4a8(\n        self, weight_quant: BaseModel, input_quant: BaseModel\n    ) -> bool:\n        is_weight_4_bits = weight_quant.num_bits == 4\n        is_activation_8_bits = input_quant.num_bits == 8\n        weight_strategy = (\n            weight_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.GROUP.value\n            or weight_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.CHANNEL.value\n        )\n        is_token = (\n            weight_strategy and input_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.TOKEN.value\n        )\n        is_dynamic = not weight_quant.dynamic and input_quant.dynamic\n\n        return (\n            is_weight_4_bits\n            and is_activation_8_bits\n            and is_token\n            and weight_quant.symmetric\n            and is_dynamic\n        )\n\n    def _is_static_tensor_w8a8(\n        self, weight_quant: BaseModel, input_quant: BaseModel\n    ) -> bool:\n        is_8_bits = weight_quant.num_bits == input_quant.num_bits == 8\n        weight_strategy = (\n            weight_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.TENSOR.value\n            or weight_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.CHANNEL.value\n        )\n        is_tensor = (\n            weight_strategy\n            and input_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.TENSOR.value\n        )\n        is_static = not weight_quant.dynamic and not input_quant.dynamic\n\n        # Both symmetric and asymmetric input quantization supported.\n        # Only symmetric weight quantization supported.\n        return is_8_bits and is_tensor and weight_quant.symmetric and is_static\n\n    def _is_dynamic_token_w8a8(\n        self, weight_quant: BaseModel, input_quant: BaseModel\n    ) -> bool:\n        is_8_bits = weight_quant.num_bits == input_quant.num_bits == 8\n        weight_strategy = (\n            weight_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.TENSOR.value\n            or weight_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.CHANNEL.value\n        )\n        is_token = (\n            weight_strategy and input_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.TOKEN.value\n        )\n        is_dynamic = not weight_quant.dynamic and input_quant.dynamic\n\n        # Both symmetric and asymmetric input quantization supported.\n        # Only symmetric weight quantization supported.\n        return is_8_bits and is_token and weight_quant.symmetric and is_dynamic\n\n    def _is_fp8_w8a8(\n        self, weight_quant: QuantizationArgs, input_quant: QuantizationArgs\n    ) -> bool:\n        # Confirm weights and activations quantized.\n        if weight_quant is None or input_quant is None:\n            return False\n\n        # Confirm weight scheme is supported.\n        is_floating_point = (\n            weight_quant.type == QuantizationType.FLOAT\n            and input_quant.type == QuantizationType.FLOAT\n        )\n        is_symmetric_weight = weight_quant.symmetric\n        is_static_weight = not weight_quant.dynamic\n        is_tensor_or_channel_or_block_weight = weight_quant.strategy in [\n            QuantizationStrategy.TENSOR,\n            QuantizationStrategy.CHANNEL,\n            QuantizationStrategy.BLOCK,\n        ]\n        if not (\n            is_floating_point\n            and is_symmetric_weight\n            and is_static_weight\n            and is_tensor_or_channel_or_block_weight\n        ):\n            return False\n\n        # Dynamic quantization is always supported if weights supported.\n        if input_quant.dynamic:\n            return True\n\n        # Confirm activation scheme is supported.\n        is_symmetric_activation = input_quant.symmetric\n        is_per_tensor_activation = input_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.TENSOR\n        return is_symmetric_activation and is_per_tensor_activation\n\n    def _is_fp8_w8a16(self, weight_quant: BaseModel, input_quant: BaseModel) -> bool:\n        # Confirm weights quantized.\n        if weight_quant is None:\n            return False\n\n        # Confirm we have floating points.\n        if weight_quant.type != QuantizationType.FLOAT:\n            return False\n\n        # Confirm weight scheme is supported.\n        is_symmetric_weight = weight_quant.symmetric\n        is_static_weight = not weight_quant.dynamic\n        is_per_tensor_or_channel_weight = weight_quant.strategy in [\n            QuantizationStrategy.TENSOR,\n            QuantizationStrategy.CHANNEL,\n        ]\n        if not (\n            is_symmetric_weight\n            and is_static_weight  # noqa: SIM103\n            and is_per_tensor_or_channel_weight\n        ):\n            return False\n\n        # All conditions satisfied.\n        return True\n\n    def _is_fp4a4_nvfp4(\n        self, weight_quant: QuantizationArgs, input_quant: QuantizationArgs\n    ):\n        if weight_quant is None or input_quant is None:\n            return False\n\n        is_tensor_group_quant = (\n            weight_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.TENSOR_GROUP.value\n            and input_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.TENSOR_GROUP.value\n        )\n        is_symmetric = weight_quant.symmetric and input_quant.symmetric\n\n        is_group_size_16 = (\n            weight_quant.group_size == 16 and input_quant.group_size == 16\n        )\n        is_float_type = (\n            weight_quant.type == QuantizationType.FLOAT\n            and input_quant.type == QuantizationType.FLOAT\n        )\n        is_4_bits = weight_quant.num_bits == 4 and input_quant.num_bits == 4\n\n        return (\n            is_tensor_group_quant\n            and is_float_type\n            and is_4_bits\n            and is_group_size_16\n            and is_symmetric\n        )\n\n    def _is_wNa16_group_channel(\n        self, weight_quant: BaseModel, input_quant: BaseModel\n    ) -> bool:\n        input_quant_none = input_quant is None\n        is_channel_group = (\n            weight_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.CHANNEL.value\n            or weight_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.GROUP.value\n        )\n        is_static = not weight_quant.dynamic\n\n        # Both symmetric and asymmetric weight quant are handled by\n        # CompressedTensorsWNA16 via the Marlin kernel path; asymmetric\n        # checkpoints carry a weight zero-point.\n        return is_channel_group and input_quant_none and is_static\n\n    def _is_mxint4a16(self, weight_quant: BaseModel, input_quant: BaseModel) -> bool:\n        input_quant_none = input_quant is None\n        is_symmetric = weight_quant.symmetric\n        is_mxint4 = (\n            weight_quant.num_bits == 4\n            and weight_quant.type == QuantizationType.INT\n            and weight_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.GROUP.value\n            and weight_quant.group_size == 32\n        )\n        is_static = not weight_quant.dynamic\n\n        return is_mxint4 and input_quant_none and is_symmetric and is_static\n\n    def _is_dynamic_token_w4(\n        self, weight_quant: BaseModel, input_quant: BaseModel\n    ) -> bool:\n        is_w4 = weight_quant.num_bits == 4\n        weight_strategy = (\n            weight_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.TENSOR.value\n            or weight_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.CHANNEL.value\n            or weight_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.GROUP.value\n        )\n        if input_quant is not None:\n            is_token = (\n                weight_strategy\n                and input_quant.strategy == QuantizationStrategy.TOKEN.value\n            )\n            is_dynamic = not weight_quant.dynamic and input_quant.dynamic\n        else:\n            is_token = weight_strategy\n            is_dynamic = not weight_quant.dynamic\n\n        # Both symmetric and asymmetric input quantization supported.\n        # Only symmetric weight quantization supported.\n        return is_w4 and weight_quant.symmetric and is_token and is_dynamic\n\n    def _get_scheme_from_parts(\n        self, weight_quant: BaseModel, input_quant: BaseModel\n    ) -> CompressedTensorsLinearScheme:\n\n        # Detect If Mixed Precision\n        if self._is_wNa16_group_channel(weight_quant, input_quant):\n            if (\n                self.quant_format == CompressionFormat.pack_quantized.value\n                and weight_quant.num_bits in WNA16_SUPPORTED_BITS\n            ):\n                return CompressedTensorsWNA16(\n                    num_bits=weight_quant.num_bits,\n                    strategy=weight_quant.strategy,\n                    group_size=weight_quant.group_size,\n                    symmetric=weight_quant.symmetric,\n                    actorder=weight_quant.actorder,\n                )\n            else:\n                raise ImportError(\n                    \"Other method (CompressedTensorsW4A16Sparse24) is not supported now\"\n                )\n\n        if is_activation_quantization_format(self.quant_format):\n            if self._is_fp4a4_nvfp4(weight_quant, input_quant):\n                is_fp4a4_nvfp4_supported = self._check_scheme_supported(\n                    CompressedTensorsW4A4Fp4.get_min_capability(), error=False\n                )\n                if is_fp4a4_nvfp4_supported:\n                    return CompressedTensorsW4A4Fp4()\n                else:\n                    raise NotImplementedError(\n                        \"Current platform does not support w4a4 nvfp4 quantization.\"\n                    )\n\n            if self._is_fp8_w8a8(weight_quant, input_quant):\n                is_fp8_w8a8_supported = self._check_scheme_supported(\n                    CompressedTensorsW8A8Fp8.get_min_capability(), error=False\n                )\n                if is_fp8_w8a8_supported:\n                    return CompressedTensorsW8A8Fp8(\n                        weight_quant=weight_quant,\n                        is_static_input_scheme=(\n                            input_quant and not input_quant.dynamic\n                        ),\n                    )\n                else:\n                    # note: input_quant will be present for converted models;\n                    # will be ignored during inference post loading\n                    return CompressedTensorsW8A16Fp8(\n                        strategy=weight_quant.strategy,\n                        is_static_input_scheme=not input_quant.dynamic,\n                    )\n\n            # note: input_quant can be None\n            if self._is_fp8_w8a16(weight_quant, input_quant):\n                is_static_input_scheme = input_quant and not input_quant.dynamic\n                return CompressedTensorsW8A16Fp8(\n                    strategy=weight_quant.strategy,\n                    is_static_input_scheme=is_static_input_scheme,\n                )\n\n            if self._is_static_tensor_w8a8(weight_quant, input_quant):\n                if not _is_npu:\n                    return CompressedTensorsW8A8Int8(\n                        strategy=weight_quant.strategy,\n                        is_static_input_scheme=True,\n                        input_symmetric=input_quant.symmetric,\n                    )\n                else:\n                    return NPUCompressedTensorsW8A8Int8(\n                        strategy=weight_quant.strategy,\n                        is_static_input_scheme=True,\n                        input_symmetric=input_quant.symmetric,\n                    )\n\n            if self._is_dynamic_token_w8a8(weight_quant, input_quant):\n# Adapted from https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/tree/main/vllm/model_executor/layers/quantization/compressed_tensors\n# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright contributors to the vLLM project\n\nimport re\nfrom types import MappingProxyType\nfrom typing import Iterable, List, Mapping, Optional\n\nfrom compressed_tensors import CompressionFormat\nfrom torch.nn import Module\n\n\ndef is_activation_quantization_format(format: str) -> bool:\n    _ACTIVATION_QUANTIZATION_FORMATS = [\n        CompressionFormat.naive_quantized.value,\n        CompressionFormat.int_quantized.value,\n        CompressionFormat.float_quantized.value,\n        CompressionFormat.nvfp4_pack_quantized.value,\n    ]\n    return format in _ACTIVATION_QUANTIZATION_FORMATS\n\n\ndef should_ignore_layer(\n    layer_name: Optional[str],\n    ignore: Iterable[str] = tuple(),\n    fused_mapping: Mapping[str, List[str]] = MappingProxyType({}),\n) -> bool:\n    if layer_name is None:\n        return False\n\n    # layer_name = model.layers.0.self_attn.qkv_proj\n    # proj_name = qkv_proj\n    proj_name = layer_name.split(\".\")[-1]\n\n    # Fused layers like gate_up_proj or qkv_proj will not be fused\n    # in the safetensors checkpoint. So, we convert the name\n    # from the fused version to unfused + check to make sure that\n    # each shard of the fused layer has the same scheme.\n    if proj_name in fused_mapping and layer_name not in ignore:\n        shard_proj_names = fused_mapping[proj_name]\n\n        # Convert fused_name --> [shard_names]\n        shard_names = [\n            layer_name.replace(proj_name, shard_proj_name)\n            for shard_proj_name in shard_proj_names\n        ]\n\n        # Layer should be ignored if shards are ignored.\n        should_ignore_layer = None\n        for shard_name in shard_names:\n            should_ignore_shard = check_equal_or_regex_match(\n                layer_name=shard_name, targets=ignore\n            )\n\n            # If shard_idx=0, set layer ignore to match shard.\n            if should_ignore_layer is None:\n                should_ignore_layer = should_ignore_shard\n\n            # If shard_idx=1+ confirm scheme matches prior shards.\n            elif should_ignore_shard != should_ignore_layer:\n                raise ValueError(\n                    f\"Found a different quantization schemes for \"\n                    f\"{shard_proj_names} in {layer_name}. vLLM \"\n                    \"requires all to use the same scheme.\"\n                )\n\n    # Unfused layers like down_proj and o_proj will match\n    # the safetensors checkpoint already.\n    else:\n        should_ignore_layer = check_equal_or_regex_match(\n            layer_name=layer_name, targets=ignore\n        )\n\n    assert should_ignore_layer is not None\n    return should_ignore_layer\n\n\ndef check_equal_or_regex_match(layer_name: str, targets: Iterable[str]) -> bool:\n    \"\"\"\n    Checks whether a layer_name is exactly equal or a regex match for\n    if target starts with 're:' to any target in list.\n    \"\"\"\n    for target in targets:\n        if _is_equal_or_regex_match(layer_name, target, check_contains=True):\n            return True\n    return False\n\n\ndef find_matched_target(\n    layer_name: Optional[str],\n    module: Module,\n    targets: Iterable[str],\n    fused_mapping: Mapping[str, List[str]] = MappingProxyType({}),\n) -> str:\n    \"\"\"\n    Helper function to look up which \"target\" in the compressed-tensors\n    config that a layer corresponds to.\n\n    Recall that a compressed-tensors configs has a concept of\n    config_groups, where each layer can be quantized with with a different\n    scheme.\n\n    targets in each config_group will be a list of either layer names\n    (or regexes corresponding to layer names) or names of torch Modules.\n\n    First, we try to match the layer_name with a target\n    Second, we try to match the module's name with a target\n    Third, we try to map the layer_name to a list of fused module names.\n        *All* component module names must match in order for a match to be\n        successful. A successful match returns the first component target\n\n    :param layer_name: layer name\n    :param module: torch.nn.Module\n    :param targets: list of targets to match the layer against\n    :param fused_mapping: map from fused layer names to its components\n    :param fused_strategy: either \"all\" or \"any\". If using \"all\", fused\n        layers match if \"all\" of its components match\n    \"\"\"\n\n    if layer_name is None:\n        layer_name = \"\"\n\n    matched_target = (\n        _find_first_match(layer_name, targets)\n        or _find_first_match(module.__class__.__name__, targets, True)\n        or _match_fused_layer(layer_name, targets, fused_mapping)\n    )\n\n    if matched_target is None:\n        raise ValueError(\n            f\"Unable to find matching target for {layer_name} in the \"\n            \"compressed-tensors config.\"\n        )\n\n    return matched_target\n\n\ndef _find_first_match(\n    value: str, targets: Iterable[str], check_contains: bool = False\n) -> Optional[str]:\n    \"\"\"\n    Returns first element of target that matches value either\n    exactly or as a regex after 're:'. If check_contains is set to True,\n    additionally checks if the target string is contained within the value.\n\n    :param value: string to compare the list of targets against\n    :param targets: list of targets to match the layer against\n    :param check_contains: whether or not to do a substring match\n    \"\"\"\n\n    for target in targets:\n        if _is_equal_or_regex_match(value, target, check_contains=check_contains):\n            return target\n    return None\n\n\ndef _is_equal_or_regex_match(\n    value: str, target: str, check_contains: bool = False\n) -> bool:\n    \"\"\"\n    Checks whether a value is exactly equal or a regex match for target\n    if target starts with 're:'. If check_contains is set to True,\n    additionally checks if the target string is contained within the value.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    if target.startswith(\"re:\"):\n        pattern = target[3:]\n        if re.match(pattern, value):\n            return True\n    elif check_contains:\n        if target.lower() in value.lower():\n            return True\n    elif target == value:\n        return True\n    return False\n\n\ndef _match_fused_layer(\n    layer_name: str,\n    target_layers: Iterable[str],\n    fused_mapping: Mapping[str, List[str]],\n) -> Optional[str]:\n    \"\"\"\n    Match a fused layer name to its corresponding individual layer in\n    target_layers. Returns first value in fused_mapping which matches targets\n\n    Implements an \"all\" matching strategy where a fused layer matches iff\n    \"all\" of its components match\n\n    :param layer_name: layer name\n    :param target_layers: list of targets to match the layer against\n    :param fused_mapping: map from fused layer names to its components\n\n    Examples:\n        layer_name = \"model.layers.0.self_attn.qkv_proj\"\n        target_layers = [\"model.layers.0.self_attn.q_proj\",\n                        \"model.layers.0.self_attn.k_proj\",\n                        \"model.layers.0.self_attn.v_proj\"]\n    \"\"\"\n    # find layer_name in mapping\n    fused = next((key for key in fused_mapping if layer_name.endswith(key)), None)\n    if fused is None:\n        return None\n\n    # expand path of unfused components\n    unfused_paths = [\n        layer_name.replace(fused, unfused) for unfused in fused_mapping[fused]\n    ]\n\n    # for each unfused component, find a match in targets\n    unfused_matches: List[Optional[str]] = []\n    for unfused in unfused_paths:\n        for target in target_layers:\n            if _is_equal_or_regex_match(unfused, target):\n                unfused_matches.append(target)\n                break\n        else:\n            unfused_matches.append(None)\n\n    return unfused_matches[0] if all(unfused_matches) else None\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/__init__.py\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/__pycache__/__init__.cpython-310.pyc\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/__pycache__/base.cpython-310.pyc\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/__pycache__/format.cpython-310.pyc\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/__pycache__/helpers.cpython-310.pyc\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/__pycache__/mx_utils.cpython-310.pyc\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/base.py\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/dense/__init__.py\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/dense/__pycache__/__init__.cpython-310.pyc\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/dense/__pycache__/base.cpython-310.pyc\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/dense/base.py\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/format.py\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/helpers.py\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/model_compressors/__init__.py\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/model_compressors/__pycache__/__init__.cpython-310.pyc\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/model_compressors/__pycache__/model_compressor.cpython-310.pyc\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/model_compressors/model_compressor.py\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/mx_utils.py\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/mxfp4/__init__.py\n/opt/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/compressed_tensors/compressors/mxfp4/__pycache__/__init__ Handles block quantization padding if needed.\n\n        :param state_dict: local-name state dict (weight, weight_scale, …)\n        :param scheme: quantization scheme for the weight\n        :return: original_weight_shape])\n            ]\n\n        state_dict[\"weight\"] = quantized_weight\n        state_dict = cls._remove_symmetric_zp(state_dict, scheme)\n\n        return state_dict\n\n None)\n\n        state_dict[\"weight\"] = dequantize(\n            x_q=weight,\n            scale=scale,\n            zero_point=zero_point,\n            g_idx=g_idx,\n        )\n\n        return tuple[FloatTensor, IntTensor]:\n    \"\"\"\n    :param min_vals: tensor of min value(s) to calculate scale(s) and zero point(s)\n        from\n    :param max_vals: tensor of max value(s) to calculate scale(s) and zero point(s)\n        from\n    :param quantization_args: settings to quantization\n    :param global_scale: additional global scale to scale the locally generated scale\n        currently only applied/supported for Fp4\n\n    :return: tuple of the calculated scale(s) and zero point(s). For FP4, the calculated\n        scale is of dtype FP8\n    \"\"\"\n    # based on the implementations for consuming quantized values,\n    # 0.0 must always be representable within the quantized range\n    min_vals = torch.min(min_vals, torch.zeros_like(min_vals))\n    max_vals = torch.max(max_vals, torch.zeros_like(max_vals))\n\n    device = min_vals.device\n\n    bit_min, bit_max = calculate_range(quantization_args, device)\n    bit_range = bit_max - bit_min\n\n    # 1. Conditionally round the scale to the quantized dtype, if scale_dtype is set\n    if quantization_args.scale_dtype is not None:\n        scales = round_to_quantized_type_dtype(\n            scales, dtype=quantization_args.scale_dtype\n        )\n\n    # 4. Optionally remove exponent\n    scales = maybe_convert_from_mx_exp(quantization_args, scales)\n\n    # 5. Update any 0s with small values to\n    # prevent div by 0\n    eps = _get_dtype_eps(\n        dtype=(\n            quantization_args.scale_dtype\n            if quantization_args.scale_dtype is not None\n            else scales.dtype\n        )\n    )\n    scales = torch.where(\n        scales == 0,\n        torch.tensor(eps, dtype=scales.dtype, device=device),\n        scales,\n# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright contributors to the vLLM project\n\nfrom functools import wraps\n\nimport torch\nfrom compressed_tensors.quantization.lifecycle.forward_helpers import (\n    _apply_quantize_op,\n    _process_block,\n    _process_group,\n)\nfrom compressed_tensors.quantization.quant_args import (\n    DynamicType,\n    QuantizationArgs,\n    QuantizationStrategy,\n)\nfrom compressed_tensors.quantization.quant_config import QuantizationStatus\nfrom compressed_tensors.quantization.quant_scheme import QuantizationScheme\nfrom compressed_tensors.quantization.utils import (\n    calculate_range,\n    compute_dynamic_scales_and_zp,\n)\nfrom compressed_tensors.utils import patch_attr\nfrom torch.nn import Module\n\n\n__all__ = [\n    \"quantize\",\n    \"dequantize\",\n    \"fake_quantize\",\n    \"set_forward_quantized\",\n    \"forward_quantize\",\n]\n\n\n@torch.no_grad()\ndef quantize(\n    x: torch.Tensor,\n    scale: torch.Tensor,\n    zero_point: torch.Tensor,\n    args: QuantizationArgs,\n    dtype: torch.dtype | None = None,\n    g_idx: torch.Tensor | None = None,\n    global_scale: torch.Tensor | None = None,\n) -> torch.Tensor:\n    \"\"\"\n    Quantize the input tensor x using the QuantizationStrategy specified in args.\n    Quantization can be done per tensor, channel, token or group. For group\n    quantization, the group_size must be divisible by the column size. The input scale\n    and zero_points are reshaped to support vectorization (Assumes 1 is the\n    channel dimension)\n\n    :param x: Input tensor\n    :param scale: scale tensor\n    :param zero_point: zero point tensor\n    :param args: quantization args dictating how to quantize x\n    :param dtype: optional dtype to cast the quantized output to\n    :param g_idx: optional mapping from column index to group index\n    :param global_scale: optional constant to scale the quantization scale during QDQ\n    :return: fake quantized tensor\n    \"\"\"\n\n    return _process_quantization(\n        x=x,\n        scale=scale,\n        zero_point=zero_point,\n        args=args,\n        dtype=dtype,\n        do_quantize=True,\n        do_dequantize=False,\n        g_idx=g_idx,\n        global_scale=global_scale,\n    )\n\n\n@torch.no_grad()\ndef dequantize(\n    x_q: torch.Tensor,\n    scale: torch.Tensor,\n    zero_point: torch.Tensor | None = None,\n    args: QuantizationArgs | None = None,\n    dtype: torch.dtype | None = None,\n    g_idx: torch.Tensor | None = None,\n    global_scale: torch.Tensor | None = None,\n) -> torch.Tensor:\n    \"\"\"\n    Dequantize a quantized input tensor x_q based on the strategy specified in args. If\n    args is not provided, the strategy will be inferred.\n\n    :param x: quantized input tensor\n    :param scale: scale tensor\n    :param zero_point: zero point tensor\n    :param args: quantization args used to quantize x_q\n    :param dtype: optional dtype to cast the dequantized output to\n    :param g_idx: optional mapping from column index to group index\n    :param global_scale: optional constant to scale the quantization scale during QDQ\n    :return: dequantized float tensor\n    \"\"\"\n    if args is None:\n        if scale.ndim == 0 or scale.ndim == 1:\n            args = QuantizationArgs(strategy=QuantizationStrategy.TENSOR)\n        elif scale.ndim == 2:\n            if scale.shape[1] == 1:\n                args = QuantizationArgs(strategy=QuantizationStrategy.CHANNEL)\n            # Scale height matches input or is 1 -> group quantization across columns\n            #\n            # Example 1: scale.shape[0] == 1\n            # x_q: (4, 8), scale: (1, 4) -> 2 columns per group\n            #\n            # Example 2: scale.shape[0] == x_q.shape[0]\n            # x_q: (4, 8), scale: (4, 4) -> 2 elements per group (per row)\n            elif (scale.shape[0] == 1) or (scale.shape[0] == x_q.shape[0]):\n                group_size = int(x_q.shape[1] / scale.shape[1])\n                args = QuantizationArgs(\n                    strategy=QuantizationStrategy.GROUP, group_size=group_size\n                )\n            else:\n                rows, cols = x_q.shape[-2], x_q.shape[-1]\n                block_height = rows // scale.shape[0]  # Rows per block\n                block_width = cols // scale.shape[1]  # Columns per block\n\n                args = QuantizationArgs(\n                    strategy=QuantizationStrategy.BLOCK,\n                    block_structure=[block_height, block_width],\n                )\n        else:\n            raise ValueError(\n                f\"Could not infer a quantization strategy from scale with {scale.ndim} \"\n                \"dimmensions. Expected 0 or 2 dimmensions.\"\n            )\n        output = output.index_select(-1, inv_perm)\n\n    return output\n\n\n@torch.no_grad()\ndef _quantize_dequantize(\n    x: torch.Tensor,\n    scale: torch.Tensor,\n    zero_point: torch.Tensor | None,\n    q_min: torch.Tensor,\n    q_max: torch.Tensor,\n    args: QuantizationArgs,\n    global_scale: torch.Tensor | None = None,\n) -> torch.Tensor:\n    \"\"\"\n    Fused quantize-then-dequantize in a single pass, avoiding:\n    - Double scale/global_scale division\n    - Intermediate quantized dtype allocation\n    \"\"\"\n    # compute effective scale once\n    if global_scale is not None:\n        scale = scale / global_scale\n\n    scaled = x / scale\n\n    if zero_point is not None:\n        scaled += zero_point.to(x.dtype)\n\n    # clamp and round (stays in float — no int8/fp8 intermediate)\n    quantized = round_to_quantized_type_args(\n        tensor=scaled, args=args, min=q_min, max=q_max\n    )\n\n    # dequantize: subtract zero_point and multiply by scale\n    # cast to scale.dtype to match _dequantize behavior\n    dequant = quantized.to(scale.dtype)\n    if zero_point is not None:\n        dequant = dequant - zero_point.to(scale.dtype)\n\n    return dequant * scale\n\n\n@torch.no_grad()\ndef _quantize(\n    x: torch.Tensor,\n    scale: torch.Tensor,\n    zero_point: torch.Tensor,\n    q_min: torch.Tensor,\n    q_max: torch.Tensor,\n    args: QuantizationArgs,\n    dtype: torch.dtype | None = None,\n    global_scale: torch.Tensor | None = None,\n) -> torch.Tensor:\n    # if a global scale is optionally provided, use it\n    # to further scale the local `scale` parameter\n    if global_scale is not None:\n        scale = scale / global_scale\n\n    scaled = x / scale\n\n    if zero_point is not None:\n        scaled += zero_point.to(x.dtype)\n\n    # clamp and round\n    quantized_value = round_to_quantized_type_args(\n        tensor=scaled, args=args, min=q_min, max=q_max\n    )\n\n    if dtype is not None:\n        quantized_value = quantized_value.to(dtype)\n\n    return quantized_value\n\n\n@torch.no_grad()\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

% self.attn_tp_size == 0\n        self.num_heads = self.total_num_heads // self.attn_tp_size\n        self.total_num_kv_heads = config.num_key_value_heads\n        if self.total_num_kv_heads >= self.attn_tp_size:\n            assert self.total_num_kv_heads % self.attn_tp_size == 0\n        else:\n            assert self.attn_tp_size % self.total_num_kv_heads == 0\n        self.num_kv_heads = self.kv_size = self.num_kv_heads * self.head_dim\n        self.scaling = self.head_dim**-0.5\n        self.max_position_embeddings = getattr(config, \"max_position_embeddings\", 8192)\n\n        self.rope_theta, rope_scaling = get_rope_config(config)\n        self.partial_rotary_factor = getattr(config, \"partial_rotary_factor\", 1.0)\n        self.layer_id = layer_id\n\n        # If )\n\n        self.o_proj = RowParallelLinear(\n            self.total_num_heads * self.head_dim,\n            config.hidden_size,\n            bias=False,\n            quant_config=attn_quant_config,\n            reduce_results=False,\n            tp_rank=self.attn_tp_rank,\n            tp_size=self.attn_tp_size,\n            prefix=add_prefix(\"o_proj\", prefix),\n        )\n\n        self.attn = RadixAttention(\n            self.num_heads,\n            self.head_dim,\n            self.scaling,\n            num_kv_heads=self.num_kv_heads,\n            layer_id=layer_id,\n            prefix=f\"{prefix}.attn\",\n        )\n\n        # Dense MLP for non-MoE variant\n        if config.model_type == \"qwen3_5_text\":\n            self.mlp = Qwen2MoeMLP(\n                hidden_size=config.hidden_size,\n                intermediate_size=config.intermediate_size,\n                hidden_act=config.hidden_act,\n                quant_config=quant_config,\n                prefix=add_prefix(\"mlp\", prefix.replace(\".self_attn\", \"\")),\n            )\n            is_layer_sparse = False\n            is_previous_layer_sparse = False\n            is_next_layer_sparse = False\n        elif config.model_type == \"qwen3_5_moe_text\":\n            self.mlp = Qwen2MoeSparseMoeBlock(\n                layer_id=layer_id,\n                config=config,\n                quant_config=quant_config,\n                alt_stream=(\n                    alt_stream\n                    if (_is_cuda or _disable_shared_experts_fusion())\n                    else None\n                ),\n                prefix=add_prefix(\"mlp\", prefix.replace(\".self_attn\", \"\")),\n                is_nextn=is_nextn,\n                support_shared_expert_fusion=not _disable_shared_experts_fusion(),\n            )\n            is_layer_sparse = True\n            is_previous_layer_sparse = True\n            is_next_layer_sparse = True\n        else:\n            raise ValueError(f\"Invalid model type: {config.model_type}\")\n\n        self.layer_scatter_modes = LayerScatterModes.init_new(\n            layer_id=layer_id,\n            num_layers=config.num_hidden_layers,\n            is_layer_sparse=is_layer_sparse,\n            is_previous_layer_sparse=is_previous_layer_sparse,\n            is_next_layer_sparse=is_next_layer_sparse,\n        )\n\n        self.input_layernorm = GemmaRMSNorm(config.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps)\n        self.post_attention_layernorm = GemmaRMSNorm(\n            config.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps\n        )\n\n        self.q_norm = GemmaRMSNorm(self.head_dim, eps=config.rms_norm_eps)\n        self.k_norm = GemmaRMSNorm(self.head_dim, eps=config.rms_norm_eps)\n\n        self.layer_communicator = LayerCommunicator(\n            layer_scatter_modes=self.layer_scatter_modes,\n residual\n\n\nALL_DECODER_LAYER_TYPES = {\n    \"attention\": Qwen3_5AttentionDecoderLayer,\n    \"linear_attention\": Qwen3_5LinearDecoderLayer,\n}\n\n\nclass Qwen3_5ForCausalLM(nn.Module):\n    \"\"\"Qwen3.5 Model with support for dense variant.\"\"\"\n\n    packed_modules_mapping = {\n        \"qkv_proj\": [\"q_proj\", \"k_proj\", \"v_proj\"],\n        \"gate_up_proj\": [\"gate_proj\", \"up_proj\"],\n        \"in_proj_qkvz\": [\"in_proj_qkv\", \"in_proj_z\"],\n        \"in_proj_ba\": [\"in_proj_b\", \"in_proj_a\"],\n    }\n\n    supported_lora_modules = [\n        \"qkv_proj\",\n        \"o_proj\",\n        \"out_proj\",\n        \"in_proj_qkvz\",\n        \"gate_up_proj\",\n        \"down_proj\",\n        \"lm_head\",\n    ]\n\n    def get_hidden_dim(self, module_name: str, layer_idx: int):\n        config = self.config\n        head_dim = config.head_dim or (config.hidden_size // config.num_attention_heads)\n\n        if module_name == \"qkv_proj\":\n            attn_output_gate = getattr(config, \"attn_output_gate\", True)\n            q_heads = config.num_attention_heads * (2 if attn_output_gate else 1)\n            return (\n                config.hidden_size,\n                head_dim * (q_heads + config.num_key_value_heads * 2),\n            )\n        elif module_name == \"o_proj\":\n            return config.num_attention_heads * head_dim, config.hidden_size\n        elif module_name == \"out_proj\":\n            value_dim = config.linear_value_head_dim * config.linear_num_value_heads\n            return value_dim, config.hidden_size\n        elif module_name == \"in_proj_qkvz\":\n            key_dim = config.linear_key_head_dim * config.linear_num_key_heads\n            value_dim = config.linear_value_head_dim * config.linear_num_value_heads\n            return config.hidden_size, key_dim * 2 + value_dim * 2\n        elif module_name == \"gate_up_proj\":\n            # MoE: shared expert uses shared_expert_intermediate_size\n            # Dense: regular MLP uses intermediate_size\n            is_moe = \"moe\" in getattr(config, \"model_type\", \"\")\n            if is_moe:\n                inter = config.shared_expert_intermediate_size\n            else:\n                inter = config.intermediate_size\n            return config.hidden_size, inter * 2\n        elif module_name == \"down_proj\":\n            is_moe = \"moe\" in getattr(config, \"model_type\", \"\")\n            if is_moe:\n                inter = config.shared_expert_intermediate_size\n            else:\n                inter = config.intermediate_size\n            return inter, config.hidden_size\n        elif module_name == \"gate_up_proj_moe\":\n            return config.hidden_size, config.moe_intermediate_size * 2\n        elif module_name == \"down_proj_moe\":\n            return config.moe_intermediate_size, config.hidden_size\n        elif module_name == \"embed_tokens\":\n            return config.vocab_size, config.hidden_size\n        elif module_name == \"lm_head\":\n            return config.hidden_size, config.vocab_size\n        else:\n            raise NotImplementedError(\n                f\"get_hidden_dim not implemented for {module_name}\"\n            )\n\n    def _maybe_autodisable_shared_experts_fusion(self, config, quant_config):\n        # Auto-disable fusion when the checkpoint can't fuse (e.g. MXFP4 Qwen3.5)\n        # so the model still gets the #25885 multi-streaming path. --skip-git-repo-check --model gpt-5.6-sol --json --enable unified_exec -c model_reasoning_effort=high -- 'You are optimizing LLM inference cost on an AMD MI35X (CDNA4, gfx950) GPU by **quantizing a model to FP8** and serving it with sglang, without giving up accuracy.  ## Background  The BF16 checkpoint `/models/Qwen3.5-27B` is served today with sglang. FP8 (E4M3) weights + dynamic activations can cut memory traffic and raise throughput on MI350'\"'\"'s FP8 matrix engines — but only if the quantization is done correctly. Get it wrong and the model either fails to serve or produces garbage.  ## Goal  Produce an **FP8-quantized copy** of `/models/Qwen3.5-27B` that:  1. **serves** under sglang on this GPU, and 2. is at least **10% faster** than the BF16 model on a long-context workload    (8192-token input / 1024-token output, concurrency 8), measured as total    token throughput (tok/s), and 3. keeps **GSM8K accuracy within 3 percentage points** of the BF16 model    (i.e. `bf16_score - fp8_score <= 0.03`).  ## Deliverable  Write your quantized model to the directory **`/app/fp8_model`** so that  ``` python -m sglang.launch_server --model /app/fp8_model --disable-radix-cache \\     --host 0.0.0.0 --port 30000 ```  launches a healthy server. Everything the server needs (weights, config, tokenizer) must live in that directory.  ## How you are graded  The grader itself, using fixed canonical commands:  1. serves the BF16 baseline `/models/Qwen3.5-27B` and measures its throughput    (`sglang.bench_serving`, random 8192/1024, num-prompt 128, concurrency 8)    and GSM8K score (`sgl-eval`, 200 examples), then 2. serves **your** `/app/fp8_model` and measures the same two metrics, then 3. requires: FP8 total throughput **at least 10% higher** than BF16, AND    FP8 GSM8K within 3 points of BF16, AND your model'\"'\"'s `config.json` actually    declares an FP8 quantization (a copy of the BF16 weights is rejected).  ## Notes and hints  - The GPU assigned to this container is pre-selected; use the default device   (`HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES` is already pinned). - This is a **dense** model with hybrid attention (standard full-attention   layers interleaved with linear/recurrent-attention blocks). The recurrent   `linear_attn` path is numerically sensitive — quantizing it tends to destroy   accuracy. Choose your quantization scope carefully. - The base image ships sglang, ROCm PyTorch, and `aiter`. You have internet to   install a quantization toolkit (e.g. `llmcompressor` / `compressed-tensors`,   or AMD `quark`). Be careful not to disturb the installed ROCm PyTorch build. - sglang loads FP8 in the `compressed-tensors` (float-quantized) format   natively. Make sure your output `config.json` keeps the model'\"'\"'s original   architecture and nested text-config structure.
